narrative_fidelity.description: Output follows intended premise without adding unintended plot elements
narrative_fidelity.5: No negative_constraints violated. Every sentence is traceable to core_premise or thematic_core. Zero invented characters, locations, or plot elements.
narrative_fidelity.3: Minor trope drift or one incidental element not in the premise; no invented characters or major additions.
narrative_fidelity.1: Invented characters, disappearances, villains, or plot elements explicitly excluded by negative_constraints.

genre_alignment.description: Output matches the intended genre and tone
genre_alignment.5: Vocabulary, sentence rhythm, and emotional register fully match the target genre with no tonal slippage. Word choices are specific to this genre, not generic marketing language.
genre_alignment.3: Mostly aligned but one phrase or image feels like it belongs to a different genre.
genre_alignment.1: Clearly wrong tone — e.g., action-thriller language for a slow psychological piece.

visual_specificity.description: Poster direction includes concrete, actionable visual elements
visual_specificity.5: Specifies ALL of: subject position, lighting direction, color palette, and at least one symbolic object. A designer could start sketching immediately with no guesswork.
visual_specificity.3: Specifies 2 of the above elements but leaves others vague or atmospheric.
visual_specificity.1: Only generic descriptors like 'dark and moody' with no actionable detail.

creative_specificity.5: Tagline contains a specific, unexpected image or word combination unique to this film's premise. Could not be reused for any other film in this genre.
creative_specificity.3: Competent and on-brief but interchangeable with many other films in this genre.
creative_specificity.1: Cliche phrase that appears verbatim in common marketing templates.

output_format_validity.description: Output follows required structure and word limits
output_format_validity.5: All three fields present. tagline is 12 words or fewer, overview is 80 words or fewer, poster_art_direction is 60 words or fewer. Verified by count, not estimate.
output_format_validity.3: All fields present but one field slightly exceeds the word limit (20% over or less).
output_format_validity.1: A required field is missing, or one field is more than 20% over the word limit.
